description: Letter from ʿEli b. Natan ha-Rofeʾ (the physician), probably in Ṣahrajt, to a Nasi (אלנשי), in Fustat, possibly Shelomo b. Yishay. In Judaeo-Arabic. He complains that a dyer named Hārūn Ibn Warda and his wife and his son Abū l-Munā have returned only two of the three dinars that ʿEli had deposited with him. He brought him to the court in Minyat Zifta. The debtor has since run away. (Information in part from Mediterranean Society, II, pp. 41, 530, 607, and from Goitein's index cards.) Goitein notes that the sender is probably not the same as the ʿEli b. Natan hwo signed T-S 13J3.20.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מ-Ṣahrajt. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
